business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

coverages_discussed.notes: Premium and carrier based on 2024 prior insurance history. Policy number implies WC coverage.

positives: Has a formal return-to-work or modified duty program
Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits
Has a formal written safety program
concerns: Does not have written contracts with all subcontractors
Hazardous materials used or encountered in operations
Certificates of insurance not required from all subcontractors before work begins
Hold-harmless agreements not obtained from all subcontractors
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 13 claims in 2024, 10 claims in 2023, and 4 claims in 2022. Policy was cancelled in 2022 by Zurich Insurance Group.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Yes, formal safety program in place. Formal return-to-work or modified duty program in place. Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits. Formal written safety program in place.
